title: As aircraft losses mount, Pentagon wants a software fix to see through the fog of war
description: The Defense Department is looking to update how older planes see each other and absorb data.
content: The U.S. planes that have gone down in the Middle East since the launch of Operation Epic Fury all lacked the same thing: a common operating picture that includes relevant intelligence and data. The … [+3208 chars]
de: Da die Flugzeugverluste zunehmen, möchte das Pentagon eine Softwarekorrektur durchführen, um den Nebel des Krieges zu durchschauen. Das Verteidigungsministerium möchte die Art und Weise aktualisieren, wie ältere Flugzeuge sich gegenseitig sehen und Daten absorbieren.
en: As aircraft losses mount, Pentagon wants a software fix to see through the fog of war. The Defense Department is looking to update how older planes see each other and absorb data.
